issues.description: Second PowerBoost action is missing its condition. The effect states 'if your opponent has a Character with 6000 power or more' — this condition must be added before the action executes.
The second trigger block is unnecessary and incorrect. The conditional check should be part of the first effect as a condition on the second action, not a separate trigger.
Duration should be 'DuringThisBattle' or similar for counter effects, not 'EndOfBattle'. Verify card text intent.
